code:
import io
import string

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut found = false
  mut pos = 0
  while i < n and not found
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 61
        found = true
        pos = i
      end
    when None
      found = false
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if found and pos > 0
    let key = string.substring(line, 0, pos)
    let value = string.substring(line, pos + 1, n)
    print("#{key}:#{value}")
  end
end

mut done = false
while not done
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    process(line)
  when None
    done = true
  end
end
